steps.title: Find the central action
steps.content: The text describes bowls recovered from a shipwreck, a tool that identifies their chemical makeup without damage, and a comparison with old kiln materials. The point is that researchers can identify which kilns likely made the bowls.

steps.title: Separate details from main idea
steps.content: A shifts to locating shipwrecks, which the tool is not used for here. B says researchers identified kiln locations, but those sites were already known for comparison. D focuses on possible earlier methods and damage, a supporting detail rather than the main claim. The main idea is identifying the bowls' likely origin. The answer is C.
